author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Diplodocus Herd was a very long sauropod dinosaur characterized by an extremely long neck and a whip-like tail that contained over 80 vertebrae.
Diplodocus Herd lived during the Late Jurassic epoch in what is now western North America.
